item.title: Builds a Six-Door Masterpiece
item.description: A massive custom six-door truck project comes together through fabrication, engineering, and creative design work. What makes builds like this so impressive?

item.title: Komatsu Dozer Gets a Boost
item.description: A Komatsu bulldozer receives repairs and upgrades to improve performance and get it back to work. What’s the toughest part of reviving heavy equipment?

item.title: DEBOSS GARAGE turns an old tube TV into a project

item.title: Ford F-150 5.4 Triton V8 Review
item.description: A closer look at the Ford F-150 equipped with the 5.4 Triton V8, covering performance, reliability, and ownership experience. Is the Triton V8 better than its reputation suggests?
